title: Rep's Amber Additions
description: A small mod that adds amber and many things surrounding it.
body:
# About
Amber Additions is a small mod that adds various additions surrounding amber to the game. Some of these things include an Amber Block and Amber Fossil, New mob, new wood type, and more!
This is my first mod and I plan on making more in the future!


 ## Video Showcase

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1OpRwW8BCL8

# Credit
 Creator/Programmer/Artist : Repook

Artist : Ben


# Installation Requirements
This is a strictly fabric mod.
![faric api image](https://i.imgur.com/Ol1Tcf8.png)
